title: BEM-585 reply intake diagnosis
objective:

"""
sep='\n'
reports=Path('governance/reports'); reports.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
protocols=Path('governance/protocols'); protocols.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
proofs=Path('governance/codex/proofs'); proofs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl'); transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
contour=Path('governance/state/contour_status.json'); contour.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)

paths={
  'operator_decision_dispatcher':'.github/workflows/operator-decision-dispatcher.yml',
  'operator_decision_pick':'scripts/operator_decision_pick.py',
  'operator_decision_record_dispatch':'scripts/operator_decision_record_dispatch.py',
  'operator_decision_queue':'governance/operator_decision_queue',
  'operator_decisions':'governance/operator_decisions',
  'telegram_outbox':'governance/telegram_outbox.jsonl',
  'curator_workflow':'.github/workflows/curator-hourly-report.yml'
}
exist={k:Path(v).exists() for k,v in paths.items()}

protocol=protocols/'OPERATOR_REPLY_INTAKE_POLICY.md'
protocol.write_text('# BEM-585 | Operator Reply Intake Policy'+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-17 | 22:24 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'## Проблема'+sep+sep+'Оператор может получить decision message и ответить `1`, но без отдельного intake-канала этот ответ не попадёт в repo. Ошибка HTTP 403 означает, что текущий входящий путь Telegram не имеет прав или ведёт не в тот обработчик.'+sep+sep+'## Правило'+sep+sep+'1. Telegram отправка решения и приём ответа — разные контуры.'+sep+'2. Ответ оператора `1/2/3/свой вариант` должен фиксироваться в `governance/operator_decisions/<decision_id>.json`.'+sep+'3. После фиксации решения создаётся handoff куратору.'+sep+'4. Если webhook недоступен, нужен fallback: GitHub Action poller через Telegram Bot API `getUpdates`.'+sep+sep+'## Требуемый контур'+sep+sep+'Telegram message -> operator reply -> intake handler/poller -> operator_decisions JSON -> curator handoff.'+sep)

report=reports/'bem585_operator_reply_intake_diagnosis.md'
report_lines=[
'# BEM-585 | Operator Reply Intake Diagnosis',
'',
'Дата: 2026-05-17 | 22:24 (UTC+3)',
'',
'## Observation',
'Operator replied `1` in Telegram and received `HTTP 403`. Current decision was not proven as persisted in repo.',
'',
'## Existing files',
json.dumps(exist, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2),
'',
'## Diagnosis',
'Telegram outbound decision dispatcher exists, but inbound operator reply intake is not yet proven. Text reply `1/2/3` requires a handler or polling workflow that writes operator_decisions JSON.',
'',
'## Required fix',
'Implement operator reply intake: get Telegram update, match active decision_id, create governance/operator_decisions/<decision_id>.json, then handoff to curator.',
'',
'## Blocker',
'OPERATOR_REPLY_INTAKE_NOT_IMPLEMENTED_OR_FORBIDDEN',
]
report.write_text(sep.join(report_lines)+sep)
record={'record_type':'bem585_operator_reply_intake_diagnosis','cycle_id':'bem585-operator-reply-intake-diagnosis','source':'gpt','status':'blocked','existing_files':exist,'blocker':{'code':'OPERATOR_REPLY_INTAKE_NOT_IMPLEMENTED_OR_FORBIDDEN','message':'Telegram text reply produced HTTP 403; inbound operator decision persistence is not implemented/proven.'},'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 22:24 (UTC+3)'}
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as handle: handle.write(json.dumps(record,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
state={}
if contour.exists():
    try: state=json.loads(contour.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except Exception: state={}
state['bem585_operator_reply_intake_diagnosis']={'status':'blocked','blocker':record['blocker'],'next':'implement_operator_reply_intake_poller_or_webhook'}
state['updated_at']='2026-05-17 | 22:24 (UTC+3)'; state['blocker']=record['blocker']
contour.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=proofs/'bem585_operator_reply_intake_diagnosis.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-585 BLOCKED: operator Telegram text reply returned HTTP 403; inbound decision intake missing/not proven.\n')
changed_files.extend([str(protocol),str(report),str(transport),str(contour),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Diagnosed missing/forbidden operator reply intake after Telegram HTTP 403')
